name: Weapon Master
summary: You have practiced extensively with a variety of weapons, gaining the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You have practiced extensively with a variety of weapons, gaining the following benefits:

items: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You gain proficiency with four weapons of your choice. Each one must be a simple or a martial weapon.

abilityIncrease.description: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

highlights: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You gain proficiency with four weapons of your choice. Each one must be a simple or a martial weapon.
